Insert Row.description: Add a single row to a table.

Insert Multiple Rows.description: Add many rows to a table in a single statement.

Update Row.description: Modify the values of an existing row matched by a unique column.

Upsert Row.description: Insert a row, or update it if a conflict is hit on the unique key.

Find Row.description: Look up a single row using a column/value filter.

Find Row via Custom Query.description: Locate a row using a custom SQL query you control.

Find Rows via Custom Query.description: Retrieve many rows using a custom SQL query.

Describe Table.description: Return the column definitions for a table.
